notes: Core asteroids mechanics work well including splitting, UFO, wrapping, and waves, but the ship's renderShip function draws it pointing upward (moveTo 0,-18) while angle starts at -π/2 so the visual orientation is slightly off, the title screen calls renderShip on an uninitialized ship causing a potential error, and the 'PAUSED' state is reused for wave transitions which is misleading.
The game crashes on the very first frame because the ship object is never initialized before rendering, and even if fixed, the ship's visual angle is misaligned by 90 degrees from its movement.

It captures basic Asteroids presentation and movement, but important gameplay logic is incomplete/broken (notably missing UFO-bullet rendering/collisions and awkward state flow), so this is only a middling build.
